subjective: Patient presents with chest pain since yesterday, worse with exertion. Reports mild shortness of breath. Takes lisinopril for hypertension. Allergic to penicillin.
objective: Vital signs not documented in transcript. Labs/tests discussed: EKG, blood work.
assessment: Clinical presentation consistent with chest pain. Known condition: Hypertension.
plan: Order EKG and blood work. Prescribe nitroglycerin PRN. Follow up in one week.
